data.body: SCOPE EXTENSION (preplanning 2026-04-20): This documentation story now covers both (a) the ticket delete command and (b) the new duplicates and supersedes link relations. Update ticket-cli-reference.md section for ticket link to document the 5 allowed relation values (was 3: blocks/depends_on/relates_to; now 5: +duplicates/+supersedes). Include directional semantics (who duplicates whom; who supersedes whom) and note that these relations are non-blocking (do not affect ready_to_work or blockers). Reference epic 83e2-04ae for Jira sync semantics (lossy Relates with local-richer-wins precedence).
